title: Total Functions, Result Values, and Pattern Matching · Functional Systems Mission
summary: A community service intake team must explain every rejected record. Compose validators and decorators while returning explicit success and failure data. Planned artifact: Deliver Composable Intake Validation Engine with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use partial application to bind stable configuration without hiding required arguments.
Use cache and lru_cache only for hashable inputs with stable effect-free semantics.
Design singledispatch registrations around first-argument type contracts and safe fallbacks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.
